---
title: "Germany"
format: html
editor: visual
theme: materia
---

```{r}
#| echo: FALSE
#| message: FALSE
#| warning: FALSE
library(plotly)

germany_center_lon <- 10.4515
germany_center_lat <- 51.1657

plot_ly(
  type = "choropleth",
  locations = "DEU",          
  z = 1,                      
  locationmode = "ISO-3",
  colorscale = list(c(0, 1), c("lightblue", "lightblue")),
  showscale = FALSE
) |> 
  layout(
    geo = list(
      projection = list(
        type = "orthographic",
        scale = 3
      ),
      center = list(
        lon = germany_center_lon,
        lat = germany_center_lat
      ),
      showland = TRUE,
      landcolor = "lightgray",
      showcoastlines = TRUE,
      showocean = TRUE,
      oceancolor = "white",
      bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      framecolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"
    )
)
```
